data.name: Security Guard Sex - Episode 3
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard: things get interesting when he catches two attractive women smoking in the restroom.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Vivian and Tatiana, two tall, attractive women, head to the restroom together.
Feeling slightly tipsy and sharing intimate touches, they find themselves impressed by the fancy look and lighting of the place.
Inspired by the setting, they decide to take some provocative pictures for their online followers.
After their photo shoot, they light up a cigarette to unwind.
But suddenly, the alarms go off.
Jeff, the security guard, realizes something unusual is happening and goes to check on them.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

data.short_description: A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard: things get interesting when he catches two attractive women smoking in the restroom.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
